inputs.label: Percentage Score
inputs.businessContext: Enter the percentage score to convert to a letter grade.

inputs.label: A Minimum
inputs.businessContext: Set the minimum percentage required to achieve an A grade.

inputs.label: B Minimum
inputs.businessContext: Set the minimum percentage required to achieve a B grade.

inputs.label: C Minimum
inputs.businessContext: Set the minimum percentage required to achieve a C grade.

inputs.label: D Minimum
inputs.businessContext: Set the minimum percentage required to achieve a D grade.

formulas.primary: percentage >= aMin ? 'A' : percentage >= bMin ? 'B' : percentage >= cMin ? 'C' : percentage >= dMin ? 'D' : 'F'
